title: Media Artifact Observatory
prompt:
Create "NEXUS Media Artifact Observatory", a generated asset history UI. 16:9 dark interface.
Show a grid of generated images/videos/files with thumbnails, download buttons, model badges, aspect ratio, quality, source workflow node. Right inspector displays metadata: prompt, seed, model, quality, storage path, run id. Bottom strip shows the workflow trail that produced the selected artifact.
Style: utilitarian asset manager meets AI ops dashboard, polished but dense, no stock-photo feel.

Rendering requirements: Generate a crisp browser-app UI concept mockup, landscape composition, no fake browser chrome, no illegible tiny lorem ipsum, make labels readable, align panels carefully, professional product design artifact for a technical architecture report.
